description_long: This object consists of two adjacent benches, one with a backrest and one without, both featuring a modern, minimalist design. The seating and backrest surfaces are composed of horizontal wooden slats with a warm orange-brown finish, while the supporting legs and frame are made of sturdy, dark-colored metal. The bench with the backrest has two wide, flat slats for support, and both benches have a cantilevered leg design that provides stability and a contemporary aesthetic. The overall construction suggests durability and suitability for high-traffic urban environments such as parks, sidewalks, or plazas. The surfaces are flat and smooth, making them comfortable for sitting and easy to clean. The absence of armrests and the open sides allow for flexible seating arrangements and accessibility.
description: A pair of modern benches, one with a wooden slat backrest and one without, both supported by dark metal cantilevered legs and designed for urban outdoor use.
description_view_0: Front view showing both benches side by side, clearly displaying the backrest on the left bench and the flat seat surfaces.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the wooden slats and the cantilevered metal leg design, with the backrest visible on one bench.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the back of the bench with the backrest and the flat top of the bench without a backrest.
description_view_3: Top-down view emphasizing the parallel arrangement of the wooden slats and the open, accessible seating surfaces.
